hide_action: mask finally slips, {prop} trembling as buried emotion breaks through the neon surface
turns away from the brightest edge, {prop} partly hidden as the emotion surfaces
default_action: looks past the camera as long-held emotion surfaces, {prop} vibrating faintly with the vocal line
lowers the gaze, then lets {prop} rise into the frame with restrained emotion
holds still while the surrounding light moves around {prop}

cry_action: lets the smile fall; {prop} dims as tears trace the neon edge into silence
turns the face out of frame as {prop} catches the last wet highlight
default_action: slows to stillness, {prop} settling into the final graphite reflection
releases the tension in the shoulders as {prop} fades to a quiet pulse
steps back from {prop}, leaving it as the final emotional anchor

smile_action: surges forward with {prop} raised, forced smile vivid against the neon light
turns toward the light with a fragile smile while {prop} blooms in the palm
lets the smile appear in reflection first, then lifts {prop} toward the hook
steps into the chorus glow as {prop} opens a soft path through the frame
default_action: pushes forward through the brightest neon layer with {prop} leading the frame
opens the posture as {prop} pulls the frame into the chorus
moves through widening light while {prop} marks the hook rhythm

music_cue_action: stands in controlled stillness, making a small hand gesture as {prop} begins to glow
waits inside the first sound texture as {prop} wakes with a faint pulse
turns slightly into the opening light while {prop} catches the first beat

shot_overrides.Intro: wide establishing anime frame with the protagonist small but clearly identifiable
shot_overrides.Bridge: intimate close-up profile shifting to a three-quarter emotional reveal
shot_overrides.Outro: slow pullback from the signature prop to the full silhouette

chorus_shot_fast: dynamic forward tracking shot, low angle, strong beat-synced foreground streaks
chorus_shot_default: forward tracking shot with widening background parallax and brighter rim light

any: slow push-in that reveals the song-specific prop and silhouette
gentle sideways reveal from environment texture into the subject
slow tilt from the motif glow toward the full silhouette

quick side-follow motion with clipped foreground pulses
medium: gentle lateral dolly following the lyric gesture
measured push-and-drift matching the vocal phrase
soft parallax slide that lets the environment answer the lyric
slow: lingering drift with minimal hand and eye movement
slow suspended camera breath around the motif

fast: rising handheld drift with quick light pulses before the hook
short accelerating push with light ticks gathering before the chorus
medium: subtle handheld drift that builds anticipation
slow diagonal rise as the harmony thickens
held push-in with a small breath before the hook
slow: gradual tilt and suspended pause before the emotional turn
quiet upward drift ending in a held frame

smooth orbit that widens the chorus space

still close frame interrupted by one precise motif-led camera shift
